jobs.purpose: Rebuild the tenant's compiled CSS after a theme activation, a token-override change, or a preset schema migration. Walks the active themes for the tenant (up to two — one per mode), resolves the token cascade, materialises the final custom-property block, uploads to storage, and fires ThemeCacheInvalidated.
steps: Resolve platform_default_preset ← selected_preset ← theme_token_overrides for each active theme.
Compile resolved tokens into a CSS custom-property block per mode (:root + .dark { ... } scoping).
Persist the compiled CSS to storage via storage::FileRepository (kind='theme-compiled-css'). Sign a fresh URL.
Update Theme.tokens_snapshot for each active theme (frozen final map).
Fire ThemeCacheInvalidated with compiled_css_url + compiled_css_hash.
Bust the Redis cache keys: theme:resolved:{tenant_id}:{mode} + theme:compiled-css:{tenant_id}.
jobs.uniqueVia: tenant_id — coalesces multiple rapid changes into one rebuild

jobs.purpose: Generate a preview thumbnail for a preset via headless browser (Puppeteer / Chromium). Renders a canonical preview template (dashboard mock) with the preset's tokens applied, screenshots, uploads to storage, writes the signed URL to ThemePreset.preview_thumbnail_url.
steps: Compile the preset's tokens into CSS custom properties.
Load the canonical preview HTML template (a small dashboard mock — sidebar, card, button, chip, alert).
Inject the compiled CSS + capture a 1200×630 PNG (also usable for OG image).
Upload via storage::FileRepository (kind='theme-preset-thumbnail').
Write the signed URL to ThemePreset.preview_thumbnail_url.

jobs.purpose: Warm the Redis resolved-tokens cache for a tenant proactively — dispatched by RegenerateRenderedCssJob AFTER the CSS write commits, and by scheduled tasks so cache-cold requests are rare.
steps: For each active theme in (tenant_id, mode): resolve the cascade, materialise the token map.
SET theme:resolved:{tenant_id}:{mode} with TTL 3600s.
SET theme:compiled-css:{tenant_id}:{mode} to the signed URL with TTL 3600s.

jobs.purpose: Nightly retention pass. Keeps the last-5 activations per (tenant_id, mode) for rollback (last-20 when the tenant has theme_rollback_extended). Older Theme rows are hard-deleted (their tokens_snapshot is no longer reachable, and rollback UI does not offer them).
steps: For each tenant, for each mode: SELECT Theme rows ORDER BY activated_at DESC OFFSET N (N = 5 or 20).
Hard-delete those rows.
Emit tenant-scoped retention audit trail via compliance::RetentionRun.

jobs.purpose: Runs when a platform-default preset ships new tokens (via platform-admin UpdatePlatformThemePresetAction). Walks every downstream Theme.selected_preset_id = this.id and re-computes their tokens_snapshot to pick up the new preset keys — while preserving existing tenant token overrides on top.
steps: Find every Theme WHERE selected_preset_id = preset.id AND is_active = true.
For each affected theme: re-resolve the cascade (new preset tokens ← existing overrides) → new tokens_snapshot.
Dispatch RegenerateRenderedCssJob for each affected tenant to rebuild their compiled CSS.
Fire ThemeCacheInvalidated per tenant.
jobs.notes: Fan-out is proportional to the number of tenants using the platform preset. Batched — the job dispatches child RegenerateRenderedCssJob jobs concurrently (up to a rate ceiling).
